creator: dclarke@blastwave.org
text:
Could someone please, for the love of all that is reasonable, please
change the patch file thus : 

t# head files/patch-include_CGAL_boost_graph_iterator.h 
--- ../CGAL-5.6/include/CGAL/boost/graph/iterator.h     2024-02-24 21:04:12 UTC
+++ ../CGAL-5.6/include/CGAL/boost/graph/iterator.h
@@ -214,11 +214,6 @@ class Halfedge_around_source_iterator { (public)
 

Just change that thing and remove the ".1" from the version.
